query: What HDF5 fields can I request via `atl08_fields`?
expected_behavior: Recognizes this as a two-hop lookup: selector listing, then per-selector field list.
Fetches /source/schema/icesat2/fields.json (the selectors listing) — located via domains.icesat2.fields_url from the index.
Finds the selector entry named `atl08` in the `selectors` list (not `atl08_fields` — the request param name and the selector name differ by suffix).
Follows that entry's `url` field to fetch /source/schema/icesat2/fields/atl08.json.
Enumerates the HDF5 fields that selector exposes, using the schema's own field list as the source of truth.
Reports type + unit metadata when asked or when obviously relevant.
Cites both URLs (the selectors listing and the per-selector file).
Does NOT hallucinate field names — every field mentioned must appear in the fetched JSON.
